---
title: "Título de tu Investigación"
author: "Bartaja y Cajamarca"
format:
  typst:
    font: "Times New Roman"
    fontsize: 12pt
---

## 5.1 descargando api de clash
```{python}
import requests

API_TOKEN = 'CLASH_API'
BASE_URL = 'https://api.clashroyale.com/v1'
HEADERS = {
    'Authorization': f'Bearer {API_TOKEN}',
    'Accept': 'application/json'
}

def get_player_info(player_tag):
    formatted_tag = player_tag.replace('#', '%23')
    url = f"{BASE_URL}/players/{formatted_tag}"

    response = requests.get(url, headers=HEADERS)

    if response.status_code == 200:
        return response.json()
    else:
        return f"Error: {response.status_code} - {response.text}"

tag = "#8P8CLL2JL"
```

como podermo observar la api de clashroyale nos da estos errores :v
